title: Add rate limiting to the /login endpoint
description: Implement rate limiting on the /login route to prevent brute-force attacks. Max 5 attempts per minute per IP. Return 429 on breach.

title: Email verification on signup
description: After a user registers, send a verification email with a time-limited token. Block login until email is confirmed.

title: User profile page
description: Create a /profile route that displays user information and allows editing name, avatar, and timezone.

title: Dark mode support
description: Add a dark mode toggle in the UI settings panel. Persist the preference in localStorage.

title: Export data to CSV
description: Allow users to export their records as a CSV file from the dashboard. Include all visible columns.

title: Webhook notifications
description: Users can configure webhook URLs. The system should POST a JSON payload to registered URLs on key events (record created, updated, deleted).

title: Soft delete for records
description: Records should not be hard-deleted. Add a deleted_at timestamp column. All queries should filter out soft-deleted rows by default.

title: API pagination
description: All list endpoints must support cursor-based pagination. Add next_cursor and prev_cursor to responses. Default page size 20, max 100.

title: Audit log for admin actions
description: Every admin action (user ban, role change, data deletion) must be logged with timestamp, actor ID, and action payload in an audit_log table.

title: Two-factor authentication (TOTP)
description: Add optional TOTP-based 2FA. Users can enroll via a QR code scan. On login, prompt for a 6-digit code if 2FA is enabled.
